name: product_page_1_products_hot-cacao-bag

observed_strengths.observation: 'Add to cart' CTA confirmed on PDP — primary purchase action present and accessible

Deep ingredient storytelling via H2 sections (Cacao, Lion's Mane, Ashwagandha) — functional ingredient breakdown on PDP creates educational-to-purchase bridge, differentiating from commodity supplement PDPs
'WTF is MUD\WTR' H2 section on PDP — objection-handling content embedded in the purchase page reduces bounce for first-time visitors unfamiliar with adaptogenic blends
'Ask us anything' H2 FAQ section on PDP — in-page FAQ removes need to navigate away for common questions (taste, caffeine, ingredients), keeping buyer in the purchase flow
'Join The Movement' H2 — community/mission framing creates emotional purchase justification beyond functional benefits

missing_or_weak.observation: No 'Reviews' H2 visible in PDP headings — despite 60,000 5-star reviews claimed in site meta, no reviews section heading detected on this PDP; social proof is absent at the decision moment

'Buy now' CTA links to /products/coffee-starter-kit?view=main2 (not the current product hot-cacao-bag) — potentially a cross-sell attempt, but if unintentional it represents a UX bug where the Buy Now button takes buyers to a different product
Subscribe & Save toggle not confirmed in headings — whether this product offers a subscription discount on the PDP is unverified from the crawled structure

purchase_path_notes: Strongest PDP for objection-handling and ingredient education. The absence of a Reviews heading and the Buy Now cross-link to a different product are the primary gaps. Add to cart is present and functional.
